feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to do retraction or write back to source without export process...?
entry.content: how to do retraction or write back to source without export process...?

entry.title: How to edit a connection If the Model is built on Import Data Connection in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi Team,I have a query with regards to connection pointing. Let me brief you on our landscape. We have two tenants: Test Tenant & Production Tenant. We have recently moved one of flow ( I mean Model and it's respective Story and connection) to Test Tenant.
After transporting these objects, I could able to see the Model, Story and its connection moved successfully to Test tenant but however the connection for this model is still pointing to Production environment since we have moved from Production to Test tenant.
Note: This model is built on top of Import data connection. Can anyone assist me how to re-point the connection to test environment in import data connection?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Canvas edit script options in analytical application and drop down edit options
entry.content:
I want to know what is Oninitialization  ...? Onorientation change...? on postmessage received ..? on resize .and on shake...which one is used in which case i didnt find any were when i search for it...plz help me with examples

in dropdown also we have onselect...?  onclick ..? on log press..?

entry.title: what is Oninitiaization in Analyical application design of sac...?
entry.content: why we use oninitialization give me some example ..experts...

entry.title: I'm Trying to Re-Register My SAPAnalytics Cloud Trail Account
entry.content:
I'm Trying to Re-Register My SAPAnalytics Cloud Trail Account  .I'm getting Error message like "The tenant is locked, please try again later or contact your administrator".

Please guide me in this SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

entry.title: Import Jobs not getting copied along with SAC Model
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I'm copying model from one folder to another folder, but import jobs are not getting copied with the model into another folder. Is there a way to copy import jobs along with the model.

Thanks

entry.title: S4 and SAC Connectivity : Do we need to open the HTTP flow between S4Hana and SAC ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

In our endeavor to establish a live data connection between our S4Hana environment and SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud), we are in the preparatory phase and have a couple of inquiries:

  1. Do we need to initiate service requests to facilitate communication flow between S4Hana and SAC (HTTP)?

  2. Is SSL configuration required at the S4Hana level?

I appreciate your ideas and assistance greatly


Thank you

entry.title: Comments in SAC excel addin
entry.content:
Hi

I want to use the comment functionality to create a collaboration between users, on SAC Excel Add-in, however when I close the excel - the comments are lost  - id there a way to keep them?

Thanks

entry.title: unable to calculate Net profit in advance formula SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

my requirement is to calculate net profit using total_revenue-total expense, so for this one. I have created two variable member and assigned tot_exp and total_rev in #tot_exp and #total_rev however when I am trying to subtract both these variables then 0 net profit is coming

VARIABLEMEMBER #Tot_Exp OF [d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT]
VARIABLEMEMBER #Tot_Rev OF [d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT]
VARIABLEMEMBER #P_L OF [d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT]
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
IF [d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT], "Tot_Income") THEN
DATA([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = #Tot_Rev, [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = "202303", [d/Measures] = "Amount")
ELSEIF [d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT], "Tot_Exp") THEN
DATA([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = #Tot_Exp, [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = "202303", [d/Measures] = "Amount")
DATA([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] =#P_L, [d/Measures] = "Amount") =
RESULTLOOKUP([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = #Tot_Rev, [d/Measures] = "Amount") -
RESULTLOOKUP([d/CG_FI_BPL_GLACCOUNT] = #Tot_Rev, [d/Measures] = "Amount")
ENDIF

entry.title: P&L statement accounts required to show in cashflow using secondary hierarchy
entry.content:
I have P&L statement wherein few GL accounts are part of cashflow statements , but in cashflow I don't want to show all P&L accounts so for that purpose I have created two hierarchy 1)P&L 2) Cashflow, so the problem here is net profit is part of P&L statement and net profit is not appearing in cashflow  as an item

but in data action advance formula also its not allowing to select cashflow node.I want to assign in cashflow ,due to secondry hierarchy childs are not showing

entry.title: Email notification when the import job gets refreshed in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a way to get email notifications when the import job gets refreshed ( I mean import job gets success or failure) in SAC.

Appreciate for the quick response.

Thank you

entry.title: Schediling publication SAC: You weren't logged on to the remote data source
entry.content:
Hi,

Since today we have enough licenses to schedule publication from SAC and I am getting this error:

You weren't logged on to the remote data source

Info: You weren't logged on to the remote data source automatically. Please ask your administrator to verify the SAML Single Sign-On configuration for connection BRW.

I am trying to understand where is the problem, but I cannot find a log with the error.

We have the following things:

1. Live connection to BW 7.50 on Hana

2. SSO to BW using Okta IdP - the connection is valid and is being used by now for accessing data in stories

3. Cloud connector 2.16.0 installed with the whole SAC Kit - the CC is set up according to the instructions for using Advanced features with live connection but I don't know if it is correct. By now we have been using only live connection and the scheduling is the first thing to test the CC. We've changed the default UI certificate with one from DigiCert and also activated Tomcat for SSL. As I said before, I am not sure if the settings are correct. The subaccount from SAC is added to CC and a connection to BW using HTTPS as well. Our BW is also using DigiCert certificate. In fact, in CC everything looks green.

4. The connection in SAC is marked to use advanced features

Could anyone, please, tell me where might be the problem or where to find helpful logs?

entry.title: Export data from SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

does anyone know if there is any way to save data directly from SAC story to BigQuery?

Let's say somebody makes a change to a table that links to SAC model and then when they press the button in the story, that change is being reflected in the bigquery table. 

Thank you in advance, any advice is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Currency to be removed from column (SAC Live Data Model)
entry.content: I am trying to remove INR and Nos from the SAC Live Data Model, but I am not able to find the option to hide it. How can we hide it from the report?

entry.title: Email Notification If the Job finished successfully in Data Actions in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Just to wanted to know, if there is any feasibility to get email notifications upon successful completion of job in Data Actions. If so, what are the steps to configure to get this email notifications.

Please find below the screenshot for the same.

Appreciate for Quick response. Thank you.

entry.title: How I can merge member cell sap sac ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Have request to show only 1 line total for every combination in table. 

I have Project and Deliverable Dimension. Each project might have 3 deliverables.

Showing them in table will lead to showing 3 lines which I dont want. I need to show only in 1 line. 

Any workaround or idea how to solve this ?

entry.title: In Analytics stories, How one should copy canvas created ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am creating analytics stories & I have created canvas to display some charts. I would like to copy that canvas, but I am not able to do. I can see the option copy/duplicate, but it is greyed out.

Thanks,
Abhishek

entry.title: Dynamic Date Filter Issue in a Story Based on Live Connection Model [SAC]
entry.content:
Hi all, we are trying to create a story using the ACTIVITY_LOG model which is a live model within SAC that is used to show info in the system overview.

Using this model as base, we created a story(2.0), in it we have a table, measures and dimensions from the model were selected and data is displayed, but when the date filter is set using "Date(Range)", no data is visible, were as when a date filter is set using "Date(Member)" data is visible, so is there any limitation in setting a range date filter when the story is based on a liver model. What we wanted was to set the filter for date dynamically to show the previous 30 days of data using the system date as the base.

Any help in this regard would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Story report issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

we meet an issue at existing Story reports for few days: 

We can run story report, but in each component (table) we cant´t see data but only an error

"An error occurred while fetching the list of members."

Do you know what can be a root of this issue a and how to solve it?

Thanks, Míša

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
